frontier_rule: Work tickets whose blockers are fully completed.

tickets.title: Scaffold the momentum pullback lab
acceptance: Suggested architecture from the spec exists in minimal usable form
No strategy parameters are hardcoded outside config files

tickets.title: Implement data audit and USD MEP normalization
deliverables: Data loaders for BYMA daily bars and MEP series
acceptance: The lab stops on critical data errors
USD MEP normalized prices are reproducible
Asset coverage and exclusions are reported

tickets.title: Build benchmarks and baseline signal engine
deliverables: Benchmarks in ARS and USD MEP
acceptance: Ranking is used as a filter, not a daily rotation rule

tickets.title: Add exits, costs, portfolio logic, and evaluation
acceptance: Net results include conservative Argentine cost scenarios
Trade-level outputs explain turnover and cost erosion
The base version is rejected early if it does not clear costs

tickets.title: Run robustness, USA transfer test, and final decision
acceptance: Rules are frozen before the USA transfer run
Final decision is one of APPROVED_FOR_PAPER, REQUIRES_MORE_RESEARCH, REJECTED
